description_long: This is a classic regulatory stop sign, featuring an octagonal red face with a bold white border and the word 'STOP' displayed in uppercase white letters at the center. The sign is mounted on a slender, cylindrical metallic pole, which is typically galvanized steel for durability and weather resistance. The red surface of the sign is likely coated with a reflective material to enhance visibility at night or in low-light conditions. The rear of the sign is plain, showing the mounting hardware that attaches the sign face to the pole. The pole extends well below the sign face, indicating it is designed to be embedded into the ground for stability. This object is commonly found at intersections or pedestrian crossings in urban environments to regulate vehicle and pedestrian traffic.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white border and 'STOP' text, mounted on a metallic pole. The sign is reflective and designed for roadside use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red octagonal sign face with white 'STOP' text and border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical pole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the sign and the mounting hardware on the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and pole attachment.
